title: Part 7 – Passage unique : FAQ d'une application
instructions: Lisez la foire aux questions, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Frequently Asked Questions - TeamSync App

Q: How do I reset my password?
A: Click on 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. You will receive an email with a link to create a new password. This link expires after 24 hours.

Q: Can I use TeamSync on my phone?
A: Yes, TeamSync is available for both iOS and Android. Simply download the app from your device's app store and log in with your company email address.

Q: Why can't I see some of my colleagues' calendars?
A: Calendar visibility depends on each user's privacy settings. If you need access to a colleague's calendar, ask them to change their settings or contact your administrator.

Q: Who do I contact if I find a bug?
A: Please report any issues through the 'Help' menu inside the app. Our support team usually responds within one business day.

questions.prompt: What is this document mainly about?
choices: Common questions about an app called TeamSync
A list of upcoming software updates
questions.explanation: Le document est une FAQ consacrée à l'application TeamSync.

questions.prompt: How long is the password reset link valid?
Why might someone not be able to see a colleague's calendar?
choices: The colleague's privacy settings restrict access
The calendar feature is disabled company-wide
questions.explanation: "Calendar visibility depends on each user's privacy settings".

questions.prompt: How should users report a bug?
choices: Through the 'Help' menu in the app
By posting on the company forum
questions.explanation: "Please report any issues through the 'Help' menu inside the app".
